style_effects: Flickering translucent violet mist particles drift slowly around Ditto's form, elongating shadows bending unnaturally at odd angles. A dim, eerie purple aura pulses gently around its body, casting cold, faintly glowing ripples on nearby surfaces. The lighting mood is a haunting, pale moonlight blue with subtle ghostly luminescence, emphasizing its ethereal presence. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
